sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19689" key="ba/yis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n19689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dipping, tempering,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χαλκοῦ καὶ σιδήρου</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n19689.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a dye,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Perict.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.28.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
